comments.body:
Dogfood closeout for run8:

- CI/CodeQL are green on #540.
- Review thread sweep returned 0 threads and no reviews/comments after the wait window.
- Proof artifacts are under `proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/`.
- Guard behavior observed: demo emitted budget, loop, and retry enforcement events; review-loop emitted budget and retry enforcement events.
- Local validation: focused pytest 14 passed, `python scripts/sdk_release_guard.py` passed, artifact JSONL/BOM/path hygiene passed, and `git diff --check` was clean.

Blocked only by required human review.

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Proof-only PR adding dogfood artifacts for the 2026-05-28 run8 session, capturing raw traces, reports, and incident outputs from `agentguard doctor`, `agentguard demo`, and the coding-agent review-loop example. Contents align with the documented local-only proof surfaces and the SDK's enforcement guarantees (budget, loop, retry).

**Changes:**
- Add raw JSONL traces for doctor, demo, and review-loop runs.
- Add command outputs plus generated report/incident artifacts.
- Add a `summary.md` narrating commands, guard observations, repo/distribution checks, and staleness notes.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 11 out of 11 changed files in this pull request and generated no comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/summary.md | Run narrative with commands, guard observations, distribution/staleness checks |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/doctor_trace.jsonl | Raw doctor span/events (4 events) |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/doctor_output.json | Doctor `--json` output |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/demo_trace.jsonl | Raw demo trace covering budget, loop, retry spans |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/demo_output.txt | Demo CLI transcript |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/demo_report.txt | `agentguard report` for demo trace |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/demo_incident.md | Markdown incident report for demo trace |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/coding_agent_review_loop_traces.jsonl | Review-loop trace with budget + retry-storm spans |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/review_loop_output.txt | Review-loop example transcript |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/review_loop_report.txt | `agentguard report` for review-loop trace |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run8/review_loop_incident.md | Markdown incident report for review-loop trace |
</details>
